name: Crockpot Mediterranean Stew
recipeIngredient: 1 red or green bell pepper, seeded and chopped
2 cans (14 oz each) of garbanzo beans, drained and rinsed
1 can (14 oz) of artichoke hearts packed in water, drained and quartered
Crushed red pepper flakes to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all ingredients except for noodles to the crockpot.
2. Stir well to combine.
3. (Optionally, add 1 tablespoon of tomato paste for a thicker stew.)
4. Cook on low heat for 8 hours.
5. Serve over the cooked noodles.
